title: IP27 0AX, O.C.O Technology Limited: permit surrender issued - EPR/JP3332FK/S012
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the issue letter and site condition report evaluation template for:    Operator name: O.C.O Technology Limited   Installation name: Brandon Aggregate Manufacturing Facility   Permit number: EPR/JP3332FK/S012   "
